raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I booked XXXX XXXX tickets on American Express XXXX XXXX from XXXX to XXXX. I cancelled these XXXX tickets within XXXX minutes of booking because i saw cheaper tickets via XXXX Airlines on the same travel portal. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX You can cancel the tickets within XXXX hours for full refund to your original form of payment, in this case, my credit card. I cancelled the delta tickets and got email confirmation that the tickets had been cancelled and the full payment had been refunded to my card. I was going to use the 'plan it ' feature by American express XXXX pay for my tickets ( instalments ). Now, XXXX has notified me of refund but these charges still show on my American express statement. I have reached out to AMEX customer care but they keep saying the charge will fall off by itself after sometime but this hasn't happened. please assist to dispute this charge as these delta tickets ( XXXX ) is not longer live. i do not want any airline credits instead, i want my full refund to card as promised.
